description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python that runs on push, pull request, and merge group events. The workflow has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It consists of a matrix job that tests Python on ubuntu-22.04 with Python versions 3.8 and 3.12 across 6 groups. Each job installs dependencies, builds, and tests with pytest, storing durations in a cache. A second job combines and updates test durations from artifacts. A final job checks if all previous jobs succeeded.
